controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - responsible business conduct) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial
Institutions - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (all india financial institutions - responsible business conduct) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issuance unless indicated otherwise
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall become effective from the date of issuance unless indicated
otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issuance unless indicated otherwise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to All India Financial Institutions (hereafter
collectively referred to as 'AIFIs' and individually as an 'AIFI') viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all india financial institutions (hereafter collectively referred to as 'aifis' and individually as an 'aifi') viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure have board approved policies and review mechanisms in place to ensure better customer service
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall have Board approved policies and review mechanisms in place to
ensure better customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have board approved policies and review mechanisms in place to ensure better customer service

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that all disputes arising out of the decisions of the aifi's functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level
controls.control_description:
(1) Fair Practices Code
(2) Grievance redressal mechanism
(3) Penal charges
Note: The grievance redressal mechanism shall ensure that all disputes arising out of
the decisions of the AIFI's functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next
higher level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that all disputes arising out of the decisions of the aifi's functionaries are heard and disposed of at least at the next higher level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be periodically reviewed
controls.control_description:
The compliance of the Fair Practices Code and the functioning of the grievance
redressal mechanism at various levels of controlling offices shall be periodically
reviewed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be periodically reviewed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the board at regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it
controls.control_description:
A consolidated report of such reviews may be submitted to the Board at
regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the board at regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose all information relating to charges / fees for processing in the loan application forms
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall disclose all information relating to charges / fees for processing in the
loan application forms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose all information relating to charges / fees for processing in the loan application forms

controls.control_objective: To ensure transparently disclose the following to the borrower: (1) all information about fees / charges payable for processing the loan application
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall transparently disclose the following to the borrower:
(1) all information about fees / charges payable for processing the loan application;
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to transparently disclose the following to the borrower: (1) all information about fees / charges payable for processing the loan application

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be displayed on the website of the aifi for all categories of loan products
controls.control_description:
Such information should also be displayed on the website of the AIFI for all
categories of loan products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be displayed on the website of the aifi for all categories of loan products

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose 'all in cost' inclusive of all such charges involved in processing / sanction of loan application in a transparent manner to enable the custo
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall disclose 'all in cost' inclusive of all such charges involved in
processing / sanction of loan application in a transparent manner to enable the
customer to compare the rates/charges with other sources of finance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose 'all in cost' inclusive of all such charges involved in processing / sanction of loan application in a transparent manner to enable the custo

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that such charges / fees are non-discriminatory
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall
ensure that such charges / fees are non-discriminatory.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that such charges / fees are non-discriminatory

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide acknowledgement for receipt of all loan applications which shall also indicate the time frame within which loan applications will be disposed
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall provide acknowledgement for receipt of all loan applications which
shall also indicate the time frame within which loan applications will be disposed off.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide acknowledgement for receipt of all loan applications which shall also indicate the time frame within which loan applications will be disposed

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify the loan applications within a reasonable period of time
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall verify the loan applications within a reasonable period of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify the loan applications within a reasonable period of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the borrowers immediately
controls.control_description:
If
additional details / documents are required, they shall intimate the borrowers
immediately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the borrowers immediately

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey in writing, the main reason / reasons which, have led to rejection of the loan applications within the stipulated time for all categories of lo
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall convey in writing, the main reason / reasons which, have led to
rejection of the loan applications within the stipulated time for all categories of loans
irrespective of any threshold limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convey in writing, the main reason / reasons which, have led to rejection of the loan applications within the stipulated time for all categories of lo

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that there is proper assessment of credit application by borrowers
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall ensure that there is proper assessment of credit application by
borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that there is proper assessment of credit application by borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure use margin and security stipulation as a substitute for due diligence on credit worthiness of the borrower
controls.control_description:
It shall not use margin and security stipulation as a substitute for due
diligence on credit worthiness of the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use margin and security stipulation as a substitute for due diligence on credit worthiness of the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey to the borrower the credit limit along with the terms and conditions thereof and keep the borrower's acceptance of these terms and conditions g
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall convey to the borrower the credit limit along with the terms and
conditions thereof and keep the borrower's acceptance of these terms and conditions
given with his full knowledge on record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to convey to the borrower the credit limit along with the terms and conditions thereof and keep the borrower's acceptance of these terms and conditions g

controls.control_objective: To ensure be brought in writing and duly certified by the authorised official
controls.control_description:
Terms and conditions and other caveats governing credit facilities arrived at after
negotiation between an AIFI and the borrower shall be brought in writing and duly
certified by the authorised official.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be brought in writing and duly certified by the authorised official

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish a copy of the loan agreement along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to the borrower at the time of sanction / d
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall furnish a copy of the loan agreement along with a copy each of all
enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to the borrower at the time of sanction /
disbursement of loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish a copy of the loan agreement along with a copy each of all enclosures quoted in the loan agreement to the borrower at the time of sanction / d

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly stipulate credit facilities that are solely at the discretion of lenders e
controls.control_description:
The loan agreement shall clearly stipulate credit facilities that are solely at the
discretion of lenders e.g., approval or disallowance of facilities, such as, drawings
beyond the sanctioned limits, honouring cheques issued for the purpose other than
specifically agreed to in the credit sanction, and disallowing drawing on a borrowal
account on its classification as a non-performing asset or on account of non-
compliance with the terms of sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly stipulate credit facilities that are solely at the discretion of lenders e

controls.control_objective: To ensure also specifically state that it does not have an obligation to meet further requirements of the borrowers on account of growth in business etc
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall also specifically state that it does
not have an obligation to meet further requirements of the borrowers on account of
growth in business etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also specifically state that it does not have an obligation to meet further requirements of the borrowers on account of growth in business etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve procedures to complete appraisal of proposals in the time bound manner to the extent feasible and communicate their decisions on financing or o
controls.control_description:
In the case of lending under consortium arrangement, the AIFI shall evolve
procedures to complete appraisal of proposals in the time bound manner to the extent
feasible and communicate their decisions on financing or otherwise within a
reasonable time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve procedures to complete appraisal of proposals in the time bound manner to the extent feasible and communicate their decisions on financing or o

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure timely disbursement of loans sanctioned in conformity with the terms and conditions governing such sanction
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall ensure timely disbursement of loans sanctioned in conformity with
the terms and conditions governing such sanction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure timely disbursement of loans sanctioned in conformity with the terms and conditions governing such sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure give notice of any change in the terms and conditions including interest rates, service charges etc
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall give notice of any change in the terms and conditions including
interest rates, service charges etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give notice of any change in the terms and conditions including interest rates, service charges etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be constructive with a view to taking care of any "lender-related" genuine difficulty that the borrower may face
controls.control_description:
Post disbursement supervision by an AIFI, particularly in respect of loans up to ₹2
lakh, shall be constructive with a view to taking care of any "lender-related" genuine
difficulty that the borrower may face.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be constructive with a view to taking care of any "lender-related" genuine difficulty that the borrower may face

controls.control_objective: To ensure give notice to borrowers, as specified in the loan agreement or a reasonable period
controls.control_description:
Before taking a decision to recall / accelerate payment or performance under the
agreement or seeking additional securities, an AIFI shall give notice to borrowers, as
specified in the loan agreement or a reasonable period, if no such condition exits in
the loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give notice to borrowers, as specified in the loan agreement or a reasonable period

controls.control_objective: To ensure release all securities on receiving payment of loan or realisation of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other claim it may have aga
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall release all securities on receiving payment of loan or realisation of
loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other claim it may have against
borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release all securities on receiving payment of loan or realisation of loan subject to any legitimate right or lien for any other claim it may have aga

controls.control_objective: To ensure be given notice about the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the documents under which the aifi is entitled to retain the secur
controls.control_description:
If such right of set off is to be exercised, borrowers shall be given notice
about the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the documents
under which the AIFI is entitled to retain the securities till the relevant claim is settled
/ paid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be given notice about the same with full particulars about the remaining claims and the documents under which the aifi is entitled to retain the secur

controls.control_objective: To ensure restrain from interference in the affairs of the borrower except for what is provided in the terms and conditions of the loan sanction documents (unle
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall restrain from interference in the affairs of the borrower except for
what is provided in the terms and conditions of the loan sanction documents (unless
new information, not earlier disclosed by the borrower, has come to the notice of the
AIFI).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to restrain from interference in the affairs of the borrower except for what is provided in the terms and conditions of the loan sanction documents (unle

controls.control_objective: To ensure discriminate on grounds of sex, caste and religion in the matter of lending
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not discriminate on grounds of sex, caste and religion in the matter
of lending.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to discriminate on grounds of sex, caste and religion in the matter of lending

controls.control_objective: To ensure resort to undue harassment viz
controls.control_description:
In the matter of recovery of loans, an AIFI shall not resort to undue harassment
viz.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to resort to undue harassment viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed within 21 days from the date of receipt of such request
controls.control_description:
In case of receipt of request for transfer of borrowal account, either from the
borrower or from another lender, which proposes to take-over the account, the consent
or otherwise i.e., objection of the AIFI, if any, shall be conveyed within 21 days from
the date of receipt of such request.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed within 21 days from the date of receipt of such request

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed on its website
controls.control_description: The Fair Practices Code adopted by the AIFI, shall also be placed on its website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed on its website

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on loans
controls.control_description: An AIFI shall adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere to following instructions for charging penal charges on loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the aifi but shall not apply to credit cards, external commercial borrowings, trade credits (rupee /
controls.control_description:
These instructions shall be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the AIFI but shall
not apply to Credit Cards, External Commercial Borrowings, Trade Credits (rupee /
foreign currency export credit) and Structured Obligations which are covered under
product specific directions, as also other foreign currency loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all credit facilities offered by the aifi but shall not apply to credit cards, external commercial borrowings, trade credits (rupee /

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances
controls.control_description:
(1) Penalty, if charged, for non-compliance of material terms and conditions of loan
contract by the borrower shall be treated as 'penal charges' and shall not be levied in
the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the
advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied in the form of 'penal interest' that is added to the rate of interest charged on the advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no capitalisation of penal charges, i
controls.control_description:
There shall be no capitalisation of penal charges, i.e., no further interest
computed on such charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no capitalisation of penal charges, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure charge interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid emi) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat
controls.control_description:
Therefore, the AIFI may charge interest
on unpaid interest (including on unpaid EMI) at the contracted rate of interest till the
date of remediation, and not at the penal rate of interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to charge interest on unpaid interest (including on unpaid emi) at the contracted rate of interest till the date of remediation, and not at the penal rat

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy pre-payment charges (2) for all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and micro and small enterprises (mses), as define
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall adhere to the following directions regarding levy of pre-payment
charges on loans and advances (term loans as well as demand loans) sanctioned or
renewed on or after January 1, 2026:
(1) For all floating rate loans granted for purposes other than business to
individuals, with or without co-obligant(s), the AIFI shall not levy pre-payment
charges
(2) For all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and Micro
and Small Enterprises (MSEs), as defined in Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
Development (MSMED) Act, 2006, with or without co-obligant(s), the AIFI shall not
levy any pre-payment charges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy pre-payment charges (2) for all floating rate loans granted for business purpose to individuals and micro and small enterprises (mses), as define

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period
controls.control_description:
(3) The Directions at paragraphs 31(1) and 31(2) above shall be applicable
irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or
in full, and without any minimum lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable irrespective of the source of funds used for pre-payment of loans, either in part or in full, and without any minimum lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the approved policy of the aifi
controls.control_description:
(5) In cases other than those mentioned at paragraphs 31(1) and 31(2)above, pre-
payment charges, if any, shall be as per the approved policy of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be as per the approved policy of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the amount being prepaid
controls.control_description:
However,
in case of term loans, pre-payment charges, if levied by the AIFI, shall be based on
the amount being prepaid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the amount being prepaid

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit
controls.control_description:
In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities, pre-payment
charges on closure of the facility before the due date shall be levied on an amount
not exceeding the sanctioned limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be levied on an amount not exceeding the sanctioned limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable if the borrower intimates the aifi of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement
controls.control_description:
<image>
(6) In case of cash credit / overdraft facilities, no pre-payment charges shall be
applicable if the borrower intimates the AIFI of his / her / its intention not to renew
the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement, provided that the
facility gets closed on the due date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable if the borrower intimates the aifi of his / her / its intention not to renew the facility before the period as stipulated in the loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance of the aifi
controls.control_description:
(7) The AIFI shall not levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the
instance of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charges where pre-payment is effected at the instance of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly disclosed in the sanction letter and loan agreement
controls.control_description:
(8) The applicability or otherwise of pre-payment charges shall be clearly disclosed
in the sanction letter and loan agreement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly disclosed in the sanction letter and loan agreement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged by the aifi
controls.control_description:
No pre-payment charges which have not
been disclosed as specified herein shall be charged by the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged by the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the aifi
controls.control_description:
(9) The AIFI shall not levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre-
payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to levy any charges / fees retrospectively at the time of pre- payment of loans, which were waived off earlier by the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly ensure that it or its agents do not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in its de
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall strictly ensure that it or its agents do not resort to intimidation or
harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in its debt
collection efforts, including acts intended to humiliate publicly or intrude upon the
privacy of the debtors' family members, referees and friends, sending inappropriate
messages either on mobile or through social media, making threatening and / or
anonymous calls, persistently calling the borrower and / or calling the borrower before
8:00 a.m.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly ensure that it or its agents do not resort to intimidation or harassment of any kind, either verbal or physical, against any person in its de

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance with the above supreme court order, as applicable
controls.control_description:
The AIFI shall undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance with the above
Supreme Court Order, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake appropriate measures to ensure compliance with the above supreme court order, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has been declared
controls.control_description:
An AIFI at its discretion, may provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction
of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has
been declared, for a period not exceeding one year.]
1 Inserted with eﬀect from July 1, 2026, vide Reserve Bank of India (All India Financial Institutions - Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide relief measures such as waiver / reduction of various fees and charges in respect of customers in the areas where a calamity has been declared

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further,
the repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
